status_detail: No APF warning text displayed. APF IS disrupting the stream ??ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR and CORS errors in console. Frontend shows generic error: 'Message generation failed, please retry' (not APF warning text). chat2-api.qianwen.com/api/chat requests failed with CORS block and HTTP2 protocol errors. h2_end_stream=2 causes stream disruption but warning content is not rendered.

findings.api_status: mixed: some 200, some CORS-blocked, some failed

notes: h2_end_stream=2 iteration 1. APF IS intercepting and disrupting the stream (ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR + CORS block confirmed). However warning text is NOT rendered ??frontend catches the error and shows its own generic failure message instead. CORS header in envelope may not be reaching the browser due to HTTP2 framing issues. Key difference from Gamma/HuggingFace/Baidu: those passed through silently, Qianwen shows active disruption but no warning.
